basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Balachadi Teaching & Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 16 PGT, LDC and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Sainik School Balachadi has released the official Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 16 vacancies have been announced under the Sainik School Balachadi Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 to 50 years with qualifications for posts such as PGT, TGT, Art Master, Lower Division Clerk, General Employees, School Medical Officer, Nursing Sister, and Physical Training Instructor cum Matron can apply through the offline mode before 10 August 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: PGT Physics, PGT Chemistry, PGT Biology: Minimum 21 years, Maximum 40 years. PGT English: Minimum 21 years, Maximum 50 years. TGT English, TGT Hindi, TGT Science, TGT Maths, Art Master: Minimum 21 years, Maximum 35 years. Lower Division Clerk, General Employees, Nursing Sister: Minimum 18 years, Maximum 50 years. School Medical Officer, Physical Training Instructor cum Matron (Female): Minimum 21 years, Maximum 50 years.

qualification.education_qualification: PGT, TGT, Art Master, Lower Division Clerk, General Employees, School Medical Officer, Nursing Sister, Physical Training Instructor cum Matron
qualification.details: PGT Physics, PGT Chemistry, PGT Biology, PGT English: Integrated Post Graduate Course from NCTE recognized institution/University, in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate including B.Ed. component OR Master Degree from a recognized institution/University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the concerned subject AND B.Ed. Degree from NCTE recognized institution/University with atleast 50% marks OR Three years Integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed. from NCTE recognized Institution/University with atleast 50% marks OR Four years Integrated Degree with at least 50% marks from NCTE recognized Institution/ University including B.Ed. component. Proficiency to Teach in Hindi and English medium. Preference will be given for Teaching experience of 2 years in CBSE affiliated English Medium School, preferably residential. TGT English, TGT Hindi, TGT Science, TGT Maths: Four years integrated degree course from NCTE recognized Institution/ University with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject(s) as well as in the aggregate including B.Ed. component OR (i) Bachelor/Honours Degree from a recognized institution/University with at least 50% marks in concerned subject, combination of subjects as well as in the aggregate. (ii) B.Ed. Degree from NCTE recognized institution/University with atleast 50% marks OR Three years Integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed. from NCTE recognised Institution/University with atleast 50% marks. Pass in CTET Paper-2 conducted by CBSE / Pass in TET conducted by appropriate Government in accordance with the guidelines framed by NCTE for the purpose. Competency to teach through English and Hindi Medium. Studied English / Hindi as an Elective/Main subject in at least three years / 06 Semesters in graduation/four years integrated degree course. For TGT Science: Graduation with PCM and Physics as Main Subject in all three years. Preference will be given for Teaching experience of 2 years in CBSE affiliated English Medium School, preferably residential. Art Master: Master's degree in Fine Art with a Painting/Sketching specialization or Graduate in Fine Art / Art / Drawing / Painting with a minimum 4- year diploma from a recognized institute or university or Higher Secondary / Intermediate / Sr Secondary School Certificate Examination with minimum 5 years (full time)/ 7 years (part time) Diploma in Fine Arts/Painting/Drawing and Painting from a recognised Institute/ University. Preference will be given for Teaching experience of 2 years in CBSE affiliated English Medium School, preferably residential. Lower Division Clerk: Matriculation. Typing Speed of at least 40 Words per Minute. Knowledge of shorthand and ability to correspond in English will be considered as an additional qualification. Graduate and computer qualified will be preferred. Ex-Servicemen with Clerical Trade can also apply. General Employees: Should have passed Matriculation or equivalent. Multi Skilled candidates with experience will be preferred. School Medical Officer: MBBS Degree. He must reside in the campus and attend to the Medical Emergencies at all hours of the day and night. Private Practice not allowed. Nursing Sister: Nursing Diploma / Degree and 05 years experience with some reputed institution. Experience in Counselling. Physical Training Instructor cum Matron (Female): BP. Ed (Bachelor of Physical Education), from recognised university or Three Years Graduation + Diploma in Physical Education from a recognised University. Experience in Residential School will be preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 1 to 8, Consolidated Salary Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 47,600/- per month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.ssbalachadi.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.sainik_school_balachadi: Pay Level 1 to 8, Consolidated Salary Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 47,600/- per month

content_sections.heading: Sainik School Balachadi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Sainik School Balachadi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Sainik School Balachadi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Sainik School Balachadi Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: PGT Physics, PGT Chemistry, PGT Biology, PGT English: Integrated Post Graduate Course from NCTE recognized institution/University, in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate including B.Ed. component OR Master Degree from a recognized institution/University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the concerned subject AND B.Ed. Degree from NCTE recognized institution/University with atleast 50% marks OR Three years Integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed. from NCTE recognized Institution/University with atleast 50% marks OR Four years Integrated Degree with at least 50% marks from NCTE recognized Institution/ University including B.Ed. component. Proficiency to Teach in Hindi and English medium. Preference will be given for Teaching experience of 2 years in CBSE affiliated English Medium School, preferably residential. TGT English, TGT Hindi, TGT Science, TGT Maths: Four years integrated degree course from NCTE recognized Institution/ University with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject(s) as well as in the aggregate including B.Ed. component OR (i) Bachelor/Honours Degree from a recognized institution/University with at least 50% marks in concerned subject, combination of subjects as well as in the aggregate. (ii) B.Ed. Degree from NCTE recognized institution/University with atleast 50% marks OR Three years Integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed. from NCTE recognised Institution/University with atleast 50% marks. Pass in CTET Paper-2 conducted by CBSE / Pass in TET conducted by appropriate Government in accordance with the guidelines framed by NCTE for the purpose. Competency to teach through English and Hindi Medium. Studied English / Hindi as an Elective/Main subject in at least three years / 06 Semesters in graduation/four years integrated degree course. For TGT Science: Graduation with PCM and Physics as Main Subject in all three years. Preference will be given for Teaching experience of 2 years in CBSE affiliated English Medium School, preferably residential. Art Master: Master's degree in Fine Art with a Painting/Sketching specialization or Graduate in Fine Art / Art / Drawing / Painting with a minimum 4- year diploma from a recognized institute or university or Higher Secondary / Intermediate / Sr Secondary School Certificate Examination with minimum 5 years (full time)/ 7 years (part time) Diploma in Fine Arts/Painting/Drawing and Painting from a recognised Institute/ University. Preference will be given for Teaching experience of 2 years in CBSE affiliated English Medium School, preferably residential. Lower Division Clerk: Matriculation. Typing Speed of at least 40 Words per Minute. Knowledge of shorthand and ability to correspond in English will be considered as an additional qualification. Graduate and computer qualified will be preferred. Ex-Servicemen with Clerical Trade can also apply. General Employees: Should have passed Matriculation or equivalent. Multi Skilled candidates with experience will be preferred. School Medical Officer: MBBS

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.ssbalachadi.org. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Sainik School Balachadi Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Sainik School Balachadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for Sainik School Balachadi Recruitment 2026 is 10th August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Sainik School Balachadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 16 vacancies announced for various posts in Sainik School Balachadi Recruitment 2026, including PGT, TGT, LDC, and other positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for Sainik School Balachadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for Sainik School Balachadi Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post to the Principal.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the General Employees post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the General Employees post is Matriculation or an equivalent examination passed from a recognized board.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for the PGT posts?
faq.answer: The salary for PGT posts ranges from Pay Level 8, with a starting salary of Rs. 47,600/- per month, as per the 7th Pay Commission guidelines.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for Sainik School Balachadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 500/- for General and OBC category candidates. This fee is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q7. What is the maximum age limit for the TGT posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for TGT posts is 35 years. However, age relaxation may be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to submit a passport size photograph, Bio-data, and self-attested photocopies of all relevant certificates and testimonials along with the application form.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates apply for multiple posts?
faq.answer: The official notification should be checked for specific rules regarding applying for multiple posts. Generally, candidates may be allowed to apply for more than one post if they meet the eligibility criteria for each.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the application form for Sainik School Balachadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Sainik School Balachadi, which is www.ssbalachadi.org.

faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for Sainik School Balachadi Recruitment 2026 is 10th August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.
